Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  Hemoglobin A1c  ·  California

Hemoglobin A1c cost in California.

Cash-pay range for hemoglobin a1c across 49 hospitals in California: $10 to $203. CPT code 83036. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$10
Glendale Memorial Hospital
Glendale, CA
vs.
Most expensive in California
$203
Cedars-Sinai Marina del Rey Hospital
Marina del Rey, CA

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (xubh-q36u). CMS HCAHPS patient survey (dgck-syfz). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
